title: thlaspi rivale subsp. brevistylum
intro: Thlaspi rivale subsp. brevistylum, also known as a subspecies of the field pennycress plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thlaspi rivale subsp. brevistylum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antioxidant and antiviral properties.
